mnemonics.title: OWASP Top 10 Order
mnemonics.content: IBS AXIS CMS: Injection, Broken Access Control, Sensitive Data Exposure, XXE, Security Misconfigurations

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a syringe (injector) pushing malicious code into a database query string

analogies.analogy: Like a forged permission slip that tricks a teacher into approving unauthorized actions
